reason: This text is the Genesis creation account (Genesis 1:1-2:7) describing the six days of creation and God's rest on the seventh day. The passage focuses entirely on the establishment and formation of the cosmos, with repeated affirmations that creation is 'good' (וַיַּ֥רְא אֱלֹהִ֖ים כִּי־ טֽוֹב). There is no mention of any upcoming destruction, disaster, or calamity. The text contains no prophecy or announcement of future destructive events that would affect the general public. The theological thrust is creative and restorative, not destructive.
